text:

> > I've opened a bug for easytag:

>

>

> 388 src/easytag.c: No such file or directory.
> in src/easytag.c

This part isn't necessary because it cannot load the source file anyway.

Easytag developers ask for some additional data in the bug report I
created. Any chance you could create an account there and join the
discussion?

Thanks

Roman Bogorodskiy
